functions.test_requirement: Cover request creation with understandable field-level UTC rows: service creation flows plus DTO null/boundary validation for title, description, and wizardProgressStep.

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
The payload contains two answer rows

inputs.title: "Marketplace request"
inputs.description: "Post this request to the broker marketplace"

returns: Creates 2 answer rows for the saved request

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
The payload is submitted in save-draft mode
returns: Does not create answer rows when the answer list is empty

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
The attachment payload contains 3 upload items: 2 valid files and 1 blank filename entry
wizardProgressStep is omitted by the caller

inputs.title: "Attachment request"
inputs.attachments: "3 upload items (2 valid, 1 blank filename ignored)"

preconditions: Quota validation rejects the submission before persistence
DTO validation runs on CreateProjectRequestDto before the service is called

inputs.description: "Post this request to the broker marketplace"

exceptions: Validation error: title must be a string; title should not be empty

preconditions: DTO validation runs on CreateProjectRequestDto before the service is called
exceptions: Validation error: description must be a string; description should not be empty
